Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverSkills_toolt: Restore the perk levels and XP the character had at death. The amount restored is scaled by Skill Recovery (%).
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverRecipes_tool: Re-grant every recipe the character had learned. Most recipes are taught by skill magazines.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverSkillMagazin: Mark skill magazines the character had already read as read.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverReadPrintMed: Mark newspapers and print magazines the character had already read as read.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverWatchedMedia: Mark VHS tapes and CDs the character had watched as watched, so they cannot be re-consumed for skill XP or moodles.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverLearnedSongs: Lifestyles mod only — restore the instrument songs the character had learned. No effect if Lifestyles is not installed.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverAmbitions_to: Lifestyles mod only — restore in-progress and completed ambitions. Numeric goal progress is scaled by Skill Recovery (%). No effect if Lifestyles is not installed.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_RecoverHiddenSkills: Lifestyles mod only — restore the hidden skills (Yoga, Inventing) the character had at death. Levels restore in full; XP within the current level is scaled by Skill Recovery (%). No effect if Lifestyles is not installed.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_SkillRecoveryPercen: Percentage (0-100) of perk XP, Lifestyles ambition progress, and Lifestyles hidden-skill XP to restore. 100 = full restore, 0 = nothing restored. Ignored for any slice whose Recover toggle is off.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_CurseOnSledgehammer: A player who tries to sledgehammer an obelisk is struck dead by its curse. The obelisk survives either way; admins deleting via the brush tool are never cursed. When off, the attempt is simply blocked.
Sandbox_SkillObelisk_MapObeliskVisibilit: Which placed obelisks appear as dots on the world map. Show All = every obelisk visible (default). Show General Only = only unconfigured ("None" type) obelisks visible; skill-specific obelisks hidden. Hide All = no obelisks visible.
